history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a man
Angel kamera/framing: Medium shot, selfie perspective, taken from a slightly low angle, capturing the upper body and torso of the subject. The framing is dominated by the reflection in a large, ornate mirror, with the mirror frame's detailed texture taking up significant portions of the left and right edges of the image. The camera is held by the subject, whose hand and phone are partially visible obscuring the face. The composition feels intimate and personal, as if observing a private moment.
Outfit: The subject is wearing dark, loose-fitting, floor-length pants that appear to be made of a matte, soft fabric like cotton or a lightweight linen blend. The waistband is not visible, but the fabric drapes heavily, creating deep folds and a sense of volume around the lower body. The upper body is bare, revealing well-defined abdominal muscles and a lean physique. There are no visible accessories, jewelry, or any other clothing items.
pose: The man is standing, facing the mirror, and taking a selfie. His left arm is raised, with his hand gently resting on the back of his head, fingers splayed through his dark, tousled hair, as if adjusting it or posing. His right arm is bent at the elbow, holding a smartphone in front of his face, obscuring it. His torso is slightly twisted, with his chest angled towards the viewer, accentuating his abdominal muscles. His posture suggests a casual, yet deliberate, self-awareness. His gaze is directed at the phone screen.
enviroment: The background is a dimly lit room, visible in the mirror's reflection. It appears to be a bedroom or dressing area. On a surface behind the subject, there are several objects, including what looks like a black bottle or container and possibly other personal items, all slightly out of focus. The wall behind the reflection is plain and light-colored, contrasting with the darker elements. The overall environment feels lived-in and personal, with a slightly cluttered but organized feel.
lighting: The lighting is dim and moody, casting soft shadows and highlighting the contours of the subject's body. The primary light source seems to be coming from the front, possibly from a soft overhead light or a lamp, illuminating the subject's chest and abdomen. There's a slight blueish tint to the overall light, giving the scene a cool, subdued atmosphere. Reflections in the mirror are present but not overly bright, adding depth to the scene. The lighting is not harsh, creating a naturalistic feel.
Final style: make picture ultra-realistic, high resolution, handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect
